data.title: Ford Debuts Limited-Edition Mustang GTD Spirit Of America, New RTR Performance Model Amid Stock Pressure
data.description: Ford Motor Co. unveiled two new Mustang variants Thursday in Detroit, showcasing American performance innovation while the automaker's stock trades near its 52-week low of $9.49.

data.title: Elon Musk Pushes California, Delaware Attorneys-General To Force OpenAI Stake Auction Amid Bitter Legal Battle With Sam Altman
data.description: Elon Musk has urged California and Delaware attorneys-general to mandate an auction of OpenAI's stake to ensure maximum value for its non-profit assets, amid a legal dispute over the company's transition to a for-profit entity.

data.title: Dogecoin Has Dropped 16% Over A Month, But This Trader Is Confident The Meme King Will Hit $1 In 2025
data.description: Ignoring recent downsides, a popular cryptocurrency trader on Thursday reiterated their bullish forecast for Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) this year.

data.title: Supreme Court Denies Trump's Bid To Delay Sentencing In Stormy Daniels Hush Money Case
data.description: The Supreme Court on Thursday rejected President-elect Donald Trump's emergency bid to delay sentencing in his New York hush-money case, setting the stage for Friday's proceedings in a 5-4 decision.

data.title: Meta Documents Reveal Secret Policy Protecting Big-Spender Advertisers From Automated Content Moderation: Report
data.description: Meta's internal documents reportedly reveal a policy that shields high-spending advertisers from automated content moderation, sparking controversy over fairness and transparency in the company's advertising practices.
